analysis_plan_ref.anchor: SS2.4 (endpoints and decision rules) + SS2.5 (efficiency ledger); build operationalisation PROPOSED-ASM-1440..1459 (poc/rules-2/asm-1440-1459.json)

arms_mandatory_baselines: B0 plain host (R1 SmolLM2-135M; R2 360M on the authorized second tier): no fine-tune, no engine; RULES-1 A1 prompt format token-matched (ASM-1127 carried) — the floor and headroom gate

B1 exposure control: LoRA on families 1+3 ONLY (stated + refusal; NO entailments), size-matched to B2 via the pinned b1-upsample list — separates 'saw the format/domain' from 'saw the inference' (PROPOSED-ASM-1425/1447)
B2 TREATMENT: LoRA on families 1+2+3 (stated + ENGINE-MATERIALISED CLOSURE + refusal) — the internalisation claim carrier, S-out only (PROPOSED-ASM-1422/1423)
B3 proof-augmented variant: B2 with the one-line why() proof rendered as a TRAINING-prompt block — rationale-distillation scaffold, DESCRIPTIVE only (MD-R2-4; deviation disclosed PROPOSED-ASM-1452)

B4 engine-at-inference comparator: RULES-1 A3 VERBATIM (imported sha-pinned rules1_runner bytes; frozen R1 host + twin verify-retry k=4; f2bt SEED_BASE 20260710) on the identical S-out slice (PROPOSED-ASM-1450)
B5 R3-alone (SmolLM2-1.7B, no fine-tune) on S-out — big-model efficiency comparator

c1p content control: LoRA on the Sattolo-DERANGED closure (family-2 train targets permuted within menu class, seed 20260713, identical size and token count) — the lift must collapse (PROPOSED-ASM-1426/1448)

c7 = the three-strata split itself: S-mem / S-held / S-out reported separately, NEVER pooled (PROPOSED-ASM-1436); S-held cover-cell string-recoverability DISCLOSED and stratified by kind (PROPOSED-ASM-1444)

c8 train-bytes projection: GS-family flat lookup (QA index + aligned fact-line index, no joins) over the pinned B2 training bytes — CPU instrument gate EXECUTED 2026-07-12: S-out recovery 0/858 = 0.0 <= ceiling 0.10, GATE PASS; S-mem 1.0 (lookup, as designed); artifact poc/rules-2/results/c8-result.json sha 2c34db34... (PROPOSED-ASM-1427/1445)

c4 trivial floors (descriptive, carried in the c8 artifact): abstain-all 0.0; answer-all majority word 0.5047 on the binary-gold S-out slice — floors bracket absolute accuracies; the primary is a paired lift
A6 decode-mask: stays DEFERRED (closed 23-word surface; DV-5 tautology condition unchanged; |L| ledger mandatory if it ever runs — PROPOSED-ASM-1435, MD-R2-6)
c5 knull-sourced-closure fine-tune: NOT in this campaign; ASM-1138 claim cap carries verbatim (PROPOSED-ASM-1438, MD-R2-8)

dependent_vars.definition: exact match against the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold relation word (closed 23-word vocabulary + named refusal option; gold predates the kernel)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: named fail-closed refusal option chosen ('cannot be determined from these facts'); TRAINED and SCORED (PROPOSED-ASM-1431/1446)
dependent_vars.name: refused

dependent_vars.definition: S-out entailed-cell accuracy vs third-party gold (V component)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: per-item inference cost: B2 one forward pass k=1 zero engine dependency; B4 up to k=4 passes + engine CPU 5.3us class (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: measured LoRA training cost per arm/rung: wall GPU-h, tokens, 6*N*T FLOPs formula + the one-off closure materialisation (4.4 s CPU measured) — fills the slot rules-1 fixed at 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1429)
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

assumptions.claim: Design verbatim from docs/next/design/rules-2-train-time.md (PROPOSED-ASM-1420..1439) with the build operationalisations PROPOSED-ASM-1440..1459 (emitted, pending central registration)

Training corpus = data/rules2-train (21,796 examples; 19,946 train / 1,250 sheld / 600 dev; world-v0 kinship inventory + 700 fresh-seed synthetic families, seed 20260712), generated $0-CPU by the PINNED RULES-1 twin engine, kot-corpus-hash 8e0b3945...
Cost bands from --dry-plan on actual corpus chars: R1 tier est $8.99 / worst $13.48; +R2 tier worst $25.10 (coordinator-gated) [PROPOSED-ASM-1454]

n_planned.generations_estimate: ~90k forced-choice scorings (R1 tier: 958 S-out x 24 options x 3 FT seeds x 4 FT arms + eval-only arms + strata/repeat on first seeds)

endpoints.test: INTERNALISATION PRIMARY (PROPOSED-ASM-1424): B2 - B0 on S-out entailed cells (rung R1) vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold; paired item BCa bootstrap B=10000 (PRNG seed 20260712), per-item FT-seed-mean pairing (never best-of-seeds, PROPOSED-ASM-1439), one-sided alpha=0.05; PASS requires LB > 0. KILL-d fires on LB <= 0.
s1' (PROPOSED-ASM-1426): c1p deranged-closure recovery UB95 < 0.30 — the lift must be destroyed by content destruction at identical corpus size/token count; Holm-corrected within {s1p,s2p,s3p,s4p}.
s2' (PROPOSED-ASM-1425): B2 - B1 LB95 > 0 on S-out — the lift must exceed what format/domain exposure alone buys; Holm-corrected.

s3' (PROPOSED-ASM-1428): noninferiority of B2 (no engine, k=1) vs B4 (A3 verbatim, k=4) on S-out, absolute margin 0.05, sign-only language; CONDITIONAL on the RULES-1 A3 lift LB > 0 (--rules1-primary-lb; unevaluable => null, never a fail); descriptive companion gap fraction (B2-B0)/(B4-B0).

s4' Herron degradation guard (PROPOSED-ASM-1430): B2 stated-cell accuracy AND refusal correctness each within 0.05 absolute of the better of B0/B1; breach sets /analysis/s4p_side_effect_flag (SIDE-EFFECT: caps deployment-shaped language) without touching the primary.

G1 (PROPOSED-ASM-1437): every RULES-1 pin byte-exact (twin 399fcd8d..., rules.n3 9857da89..., certificate e0071e9e... with SUCCESS+gates+no-KILL-a, corpus digests, imported rules1_runner/f2bt bytes); verified fail-closed by the runner, mock included; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, no spend.

G2 (PROPOSED-ASM-1427/1445): the train-bytes projection must NOT recover S-out above the 0.10 ceiling. EXECUTED 2026-07-12 at $0 CPU: 0/858 recovered (0.0) — gate PASS pinned in c8-result.json sha 2c34db34...; the freeze re-verifies reproduction from the pinned materialiser bytes.
G3: acc(B0, S-out, R1) <= 0.85 — a saturated floor cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID.

G4 (PROPOSED-ASM-1439/1451): per-arm in-process byte-identical repeat over the pinned first-200-by-sha S-out subsample (first seed); B4 exempt (rules-1 decision-sha double-run discipline instead, PROPOSED-ASM-1450).

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any outcome: two fine-tuned rungs (135M, 360M) license a SIGN, not a slope; R3 is a no-fine-tune comparator only. Every claim is scoped to: gold-parse-only prompt-supplied facts (no NL-robustness claim; the l3a-parse wall stands); THIS closed rule inventory and THIS kinship vertical (world-v0 + fresh-seed synthetic expansion, axioms-v0 + axioms-kinship-v1, nsk1-clutrr STRICTLY eval-side CC-BY-NC-4.0 per ASM-1125/1421); LoRA at the pinned hyperparameters (r16/a32/lr2e-4/2 epochs, fp32) — no claim about other fine-tuning regimes; proof depth <= 4 (ASM-1160). Claim assignment (PROPOSED-ASM-1423): S-mem accuracy is lookup-in-weights (the A4 analog one level up), NEVER inference; S-held is a partial-generalisation descriptive with its cover-cell string-recoverability disclosed (PROPOSED-ASM-1444); ONLY S-out — with c8 failing to reproduce it and c1p collapsing — supports 'internalised the inference'. CLAIM CAP (PROPOSED-ASM-1438, extends ASM-1138): until the knull-sourced-closure fine-tune (c5 analog) runs, any positive result is 'engine-materialised entailments are internalisable by a small host', NEVER 'kernel-specific value'. The efficiency ledger is a price table with NO direction presumed (PROPOSED-ASM-1429): the engine's marginal compute is microseconds on CPU and the ledger may show the engine cheaper at any realistic N, in which case the train slot's efficiency case rests only on the k=4->k=1 resample reduction and removal of the engine as a deployment dependency. A6 decode-mask stays deferred (PROPOSED-ASM-1435).
hypotheses: H-R2-1 (load-bearing, the internalisation claim): LoRA fine-tuning on the engine-materialised closure lifts the small host on OUT-OF-WORLD entailed queries with no engine at inference — B2 - B0 on S-out vs pinned third-party CLUTRR gold, paired item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1424).
H-R2-2 (content, s1'): the lift is closure-CONTENT-driven — a Sattolo-deranged closure at identical bulk must not retain it (recovery UB95 < 0.30, PROPOSED-ASM-1426).
H-R2-3 (exposure, s2'): the lift exceeds format/domain exposure — B2 - B1 LB > 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1425).

H-R2-4 (gap closure, s3', conditional): B2 (k=1, no engine) is noninferior to B4 (A3 engine-at-inference, k=4) at margin 0.05 — conditional on RULES-1's A3 lift having been positive (PROPOSED-ASM-1428).
CLAIM CAP: PROPOSED-ASM-1438 — 'engine-materialised entailments are internalisable', never 'kernel-specific value', pending the knull-closure ablation (issue #6).
kill_criterion_verbatim: KILL-d (PROPOSED-ASM-1424): the primary B2 - B0 paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB <= 0 on S-out entailed cells vs third-party CLUTRR gold => fine-tuning on the materialised closure does not internalise the inference; the closure remains a data product; the engine remains required at inference; route back to the RULES-1 memory-slot architecture as the standing position; NO model claim. Pre-GPU kills: G1 pin failure, G2 c8 lookup-recovery > 0.10 ceiling (split broken), or the PROPOSED-ASM-1420 sequencing gate (RULES-1 KILL-b => no auto-run, explicit maintainer re-authorization with s3' struck; RULES-1 INSTRUMENT-INVALID/INCONCLUSIVE => blocked, no spend). Secondary kill discipline: if s1p recovery UB95 >= 0.30 the lift is not content-driven and no content claim survives.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/rules-2/modal/modal_rules2.py --print-manifest (b8e68d75... at build time 2026-07-12) — the coordinator freeze records the value current at freeze; ANY staged-byte change after that requires a correction record (PROPOSED-ASM-1459)

runner_constraints.artifact_notes: c8-result = THE PINNED PASSED G2 GATE (train-bytes projection, $0 CPU, 2026-07-12): S-out 0/858 recovered (ceiling 0.10, PASS); S-mem projection 1.0 (lookup by construction — the honest anchor); S-held by kind {chain 0/125, cover 142/142 DISCLOSED string-leak via family-1 pair sharing, typing 0/33}; c4 floors abstain 0.0 / majority 0.5047. data/rules2-train = 21,796 examples (19,946 train / 1,250 sheld / 600 dev; families: 5,844 stated, 5,722 chain, 5,844 cover, 1,462 typing, 2,924 refusal), generated deterministically by the pinned twin engine in 4.4 s CPU; exclusion ledger disclosed in its manifest (3 conflict components = world-v0 planted violations; 117 out-of-inventory records).
runner_constraints.budget_note: DEFAULT R1 tier: dry-plan (actual corpus chars, A10G) est $8.99 / worst $13.48 vs usd_cap $18 — OK. The R2 rung (B0/B1/B2, MD-R2-3a) is a coordinator-authorized SECOND launch: combined worst $25.10, inside the $35 outer ceiling, matching the design's $25-35 worst-case band; dry-plan fails closed per tier. SEQUENCING (PROPOSED-ASM-1420): no GPU launch until the RULES-1 GPU readout exists and its branch permits RULES-2.
runner_constraints.hardware: single A10G (Modal), fp32 train + eval, greedy forced-choice; CPU-only for materialisation, c8, c4 and B4 control cells
runner_constraints.harness: poc/rules-2 (rules2_runner.py; B4/B0 drivers + verbaliser + gold-leak guard imported BYTE-IDENTICAL from poc/rules-1/rules1_runner.py under sha pin; f2bt HFLM scorer bytes; LoRA via peft 0.15.2 in the NEW pinned image poc/rules-2/modal/requirements-image.txt — poc/modal/requirements-image.txt untouched). Modal hygiene: launch long runs nohup+setsid; 'modal app stop ap-<id>' after killing any client (bd memory).
runner_constraints.kernel_arm: the treatment content is the PINNED RULES-1 twin engine's closure over the training default world — provenance chain terminates in the certified engine (certificate e0071e9e..., 858/858 vs third-party gold, C_dec(entailed)=0.0); no encoder ALGORITHM_VERSION change, no frozen object modified, no new axiom minting (PROPOSED-ASM-1437).
runner_constraints.roles: frozen-design discipline: this DRAFT was authored by the build role (fable-build-1, 2026-07-12) with a green --mock and the $0 CPU c8 gate executed; FREEZE is the coordinator's (prereg-freeze.py after registering PROPOSED-ASM-1420..1459 centrally, re-verifying every sha, regenerating rules2-train + c8 from the pinned materialiser bytes, and running the pre-freeze skeptic pass — PROPOSED-ASM-1452's two disclosed asymmetries are flagged for it); the run is the experiment-runner role's; grading is analysis/rules_2.py + verdict-gen; audit is the cross-vendor auditor. NO feasibility conclusion is stated in this record.

title: RULES-2 (train-time closure materialisation) — does LoRA fine-tuning a small host on the DEFAULT world's engine-materialised closure INTERNALISE the inference, i.e. lift out-of-world entailed-query accuracy (S-out, fresh-name CLUTRR items, third-party gold, NO engine at inference) over the plain host, with the memorisation split (S-mem/S-held/S-out), the c8 train-bytes projection gate ($0 CPU, EXECUTED: PASS 0/858) and the deranged-closure control making lookup unable to fake it? Design: docs/next/design/rules-2-train-time.md; sequencing-gated on the RULES-1 GPU readout (PROPOSED-ASM-1420).
